games_completion_shape_check.name: games_completion_shape_check
games_completion_shape_check.value: ("games"."status" = 'completed' AND "games"."result" IS NOT NULL AND "games"."termination_reason" IS NOT NULL AND "games"."ended_at" IS NOT NULL) OR ("games"."status" <> 'completed' AND "games"."result" IS NULL AND "games"."termination_reason" IS NULL)

users_login_identifier_check.name: users_login_identifier_check
users_login_identifier_check.value: "users"."email" IS NOT NULL OR "users"."external_account_ref" IS NOT NULL
